creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Boris Korzun from comment #38)
> Also sanited port (check portfmt/portclippy).
This is not needed, the Makefile is quite sane.  In general, we should not mix non-trivial amount of unrelated changes together in one diff as it makes it hard to review and reason about.

E.g. you've removed the GNU make support and now have to pass -ldflags by hand, no idea why.  You've also replaced one simple stat(1) invocation in _GET_DATE with cryptic combination of date(1), grep(1), and sed(1), how's that an improvement?

> Separated vmutils files dir for future rc-scripts (vmalert, etc).
I'm afraid I did not understand this part.  Please checkout the latest version and let's proceed from there.
